attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as 38 (adult) — the source note states no age; required field populated with a conservative adult value. Clinician to confirm.
Sex inferred as female from the strong female predominance of SLE and note references to malar rash screening — source note does not state sex. Clinician to confirm.
Provisional case_id SEQ 00245 — maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-RHEUM-03 bucket.
Difficulty classified red_herring_laden (DD=03): dramatic severity and catastrophic patient framing mask a mild articular flare; the dangerous mimics are the red herrings to actively exclude.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source was an in-person after-hours home visit. Clinician-only findings (joint palpation, cardiac/chest auscultation ruling out friction rub/pleuritis, and measured vitals except patient-reportable temperature) were sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; only the patient-reportable temperature (37.2) and patient self-observed joint puffiness were placed in 01.objective_data_offered.

Baseline tier set T2 (prompt in-person review) rather than the source's implied timing, because the AI Doctor cannot examine or test to exclude serositis/nephritis/septic arthritis remotely; T3 same-day review noted as an acceptable more-cautious alternative given the patient lives alone.

Naproxen dose 500 mg taken from the source note; dosing frequency not stated in the source and was NOT synthesised. Hydroxychloroquine dose not stated in source — advised to resume usual maintenance dose without inventing a number.

NSAID flagged for possible renal caution because lupus nephritis cannot be excluded remotely — captured as a this-patient interaction/contraindication, a clinician judgment, not a full interaction lookup.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
